creator: freebsd-bug-report-yf@yf.bsdclub.org
text:
Created attachment 235571
patch for support Rails v6.1.6.1

It seems that the change to support Rails v6.1.6.1 is not back ported to gitlab-ce yet, both on 15-1-stable and 15-2-stable branch. Perhaps it will be back ported just before next feature release.

For those who can't wait for it, like us, here is a patch brought from https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/ master branch.
